info.description:
RESTful API for the Executive Information System (EIS) of Universitas Pendidikan Ganesha.
This API provides a modular set of endpoints to support various institutional processes,
including Academic Management (courses, schedules, curriculum), Student Affairs (activities,
scholarships, organizations), Alumni Relations (tracer study, networking, career services),
General Administration (assets, facilities, documents), Finance (budgeting, payments, reports),
and Performance Management (KPIs, research output, community services).
The modular approach ensures flexibility, scalability, and integration across departments,
enabling leaders and staff to access accurate, real-time information for decision-making.
info.title: Executive Information System RESTful API
